guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 36. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_th: Point to the big TH and say: ththth. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_wh: Now point to the big WH and say: whwhwh.

parent_story: The white whale blew water high. The whale swam in the deep ocean.
